claudeStatus.current: Architecting the AI Concierge: profile-building quiz + community channels + recommendation engine.

currentFocus.title: Plus One = AI Concierge for Knoxville's Cool Crowd
currentFocus.description: Locked 2026-04-17 (evening): The product is a concierge that figures out what you want even when you don't. Quiz + behavior + linked socials -> deep profile -> AI recommends events, people, food, communities, plans. Reddit-style channels are home base. Members-only feel. Ticket-themed brand.
vision: Don't make users think — quiz them lightly, learn from every tap
Every interaction (tap, RSVP, +1, dismiss) feeds the profile
AI recommends WHO to go WITH not just WHERE to go
Channels (Reddit-style) for UTK football, Old City nightlife, foodies, etc.
Plans the whole night: dinner -> event -> drinks, with people
Members-only vibe: invite welcomed, ID-verified, social-linked

items: Schema: preferences, interactions, communities, posts, votes, rsvps
Track every tap as interaction signal
RSS: Knox News, WBIR, WATE, WVLT, Compass Knox
Vector embeddings of all events + content (pgvector)
‘Plan my night’ flow: weather + prefs + events + food
+1 recommendation engine: who matches for THIS event

humanTodos.title: Pick a logo direction (1-6)
humanTodos.description: See http://localhost:4444/dashboard/logo-options.html. I recommend #4 (Premium Pill) for app icon + #6 (Stamped Stub) for in-app member-card vibe.

humanTodos.title: Pick a domain
humanTodos.description: plusoneknoxville.com or knoxplusone.com (both .com, $11.25/yr). Or want me to chase down plusoneknox.com owner?

humanTodos.title: Run Chrome MCP secrets prompt
humanTodos.description: Apify token + Google Places key + Supabase service_role key.
humanTodos.prompt: See the latest 'Here's the updated prompt' message in the Claude chat. It contains 6 tasks for Claude in Chrome to set up Apify, Google Places, and Supabase secrets.

humanTodos.title: Get an Anthropic API key (for AI concierge)
humanTodos.description: Plus One's chat brain. Sign up at console.anthropic.com.

humanTodos.title: Create GitHub repo + share URL
humanTodos.description: Empty private repo. Then I push code, open PRs you review.

humanTodos.title: Get a Yelp Fusion API key (free)
humanTodos.description: Restaurant recs for the AI concierge. 5K calls/day free.

openQuestions.question: Members-only: real invite-only (true exclusivity) or just members-only VIBE (anyone can apply)?
openQuestions.context: Real invite-only = harder growth. Vibe-only = easier growth, same psychology if marketed well.

openQuestions.question: Social linking: Instagram + X required at signup, optional, or post-onboarding nudge?
openQuestions.context: Required = more trust + better profile. Optional = less friction. Post-onboarding nudge = best of both.
